name: table
label: Table
description: A styled, horizontally scrollable data table. Compose with <x-table.columns> + <x-table.column> for the header and <x-table.row> + <x-table.cell> for the body.
usage: Wrap header cells in <x-table.columns>; each data row is an <x-table.row> of <x-table.cell> elements.
